claim: o3-mini is 8x cheaper than o1 while maintaining 200k context window and 100k max output tokens, making it cost-effective for large-context applications
actionable: Use o3-mini as primary reasoning model choice for cost-sensitive applications requiring extended context; it outperforms o1 at fraction of cost
source_title: Yup, o3-mini is WORTH your money. Meta Q4 Earnings Prompt. Deepseek and Llama4 Insights

claim: Deep Seek R1 has only 64k context and 8k output tokens, limiting its use for advanced prompt engineering with large documents
actionable: Avoid Deep Seek R1 for applications requiring large context windows; o3-mini or Claude 3.5 Sonnet better suited for 100k+ token contexts
source_title: Yup, o3-mini is WORTH your money. Meta Q4 Earnings Prompt. Deepseek and Llama4 Insights

claim: Three-step model evaluation process: Vibe Check (single prompt test), Compare (run multiple models in parallel), Eval (benchmark against multiple use cases)
actionable: Follow 3-step evaluation: (1) Quick test with new model, (2) Run side-by-side with competitors, (3) Benchmark against your specific prompts at scale
source_title: Yup, o3-mini is WORTH your money. Meta Q4 Earnings Prompt. Deepseek and Llama4 Insights

claim: Reasoning effort settings (low/medium/high) on o3-mini allow trading off speed/cost for performance; high mode provides 15% better accuracy
actionable: Use o3-mini low mode for speed-critical tasks, high mode for complex reasoning; benchmark on your specific use case to find optimal setting
source_title: Yup, o3-mini is WORTH your money. Meta Q4 Earnings Prompt. Deepseek and Llama4 Insights

claim: Structured XML prompts with nested prompts (list of questions as values) enable reasoning models to extract complex information in single shot
actionable: Design prompts with JSON/XML structure where values are themselves sub-queries; reasoning models excel at iterating through structured extraction tasks
source_title: Yup, o3-mini is WORTH your money. Meta Q4 Earnings Prompt. Deepseek and Llama4 Insights
